name: Torn Bandolier
descs:
Pierce Skills gain Clash Power +1

Skills that consume [Bullet] deal +(40/# of Coins)% damage

If the unit is out of [Bullet], gain 2 [Bullet] at the next Turn Start (once per Encounter per Identity)

Pierce Skills gain Clash Power +1 and deal +5% damage

Skills that consume [Bullet] deal +(50/# of Coins)% damage

If the unit is out of [Bullet], gain 2 [Bullet] at the next Turn Start (once per Encounter per Identity)

Pierce Skills gain Clash Power +1 and deal +10% damage

Skills that consume [Bullet] deal +(60/# of Coins)% damage

If the unit is out of [Bullet], gain 2 [Bullet] at the next Turn Start (once per Encounter per Identity)
